plan.title: Attention Is All You Need: The AI Revolution
plan.styleGuide: Color Palette: Dark blues, purples, and blacks as background. Vibrant neon accents (electric blue, bright pink, green) for data flow, connections, and key elements. Camera Movement: Continuous, slow, smooth rightward pan throughout the entire 32 seconds, stitching the scenes seamlessly. Lens Style: Wide, slightly ethereal, soft focus on distant elements, sharp on foreground. Glimmers and light trails. On-Screen Text Style: Clean, sans-serif font (e.g., Montserrat, Lato), neon glow effect, centrally placed or subtly integrated with visuals. Music Mood: Ambient, futuristic, slightly mysterious, building to an inspiring and energetic close.

segments.title: The AI Bottleneck
segments.visual: A dark, abstract corridor with symbolic 'data packets' moving slowly in a single, linear file from left to right. Neon red lines symbolize 'sequential processing' creating bottlenecks. Generic, silhouetted human-like figures observe with frustration from the side.
segments.voiceover: Before 2017, AI processed information word-by-word, like a slow assembly line. This made complex tasks inefficient and limited understanding.
segments.transitionInCue: Starts with a continuous rightward pan revealing a linear flow of data.
segments.transitionOutCue: Continues rightward pan, moving past the slow linear processing towards a brighter, more complex neon network forming.

segments.title: The Breakthrough Paper
segments.visual: The rightward pan reveals a glowing, abstract digital 'paper' unfurling in mid-air, surrounded by shimmering blue and green neon energy. The linear data flow from the previous scene branches out, becoming parallel streams of light.
segments.voiceover: Then came 'Attention Is All You Need' – a paper that revolutionized AI. It introduced the Transformer, enabling parallel data processing.
segments.transitionInCue: The camera continues its rightward pan, revealing a glowing abstract 'paper' and branching neon data streams.
segments.transitionOutCue: Continues rightward pan, as the branching data streams coalesce into a central, glowing abstract 'brain' or 'core'.

segments.title: How Self-Attention Works
segments.visual: The central 'brain' core from the previous scene now shows intricate, glowing neon connections (like a neural network). Abstract 'tokens' represented by small, glowing geometric shapes appear, with neon lines instantly forming dynamic connections between them, illustrating 'self-attention'.
segments.voiceover: This architecture uses 'self-attention', allowing AI to weigh every part of an input simultaneously. It grasps context instantly, no matter the length.
segments.transitionInCue: The camera continues its rightward pan, revealing a glowing abstract 'brain' with intricate neon connections forming between geometric 'tokens'.
segments.transitionOutCue: Continues rightward pan, moving from the detailed self-attention visualization towards a broader, interconnected digital city landscape.

segments.title: Modern AI's Foundation
segments.visual: The rightward pan concludes on a vibrant, futuristic digital city skyline, with towering structures representing LLMs and generative AI. Neon light trails representing data flow between these structures, powered by the core from the previous scene.
segments.voiceover: This groundbreaking idea is now the backbone of almost all modern AI, from ChatGPT to Gemini, driving innovation across the globe.
segments.transitionInCue: The camera continues its rightward pan, revealing a vibrant digital city skyline with towering structures.
segments.transitionOutCue: The camera slowly zooms out slightly on the digital city, fading to black as the music swells and concludes.

searchQueries: Attention Is All You Need paper summary
Impact of Attention Is All You Need on AI
What are Large Language Models built on
